title: Moat evidence, or just a story?
intro: Sort each signal into hard evidence of a forming moat vs a narrative that may not convert to wealth.

cards.text: Return on capital rising for several quarters after a build-out
Earnings compounding ~20%+ with the price roughly tracking them
Profits consistently reinvested into the core business
Share price up 3x while earnings stayed flat
A huge total-addressable-market slide, but little earnings conversion
Management diversifying into unrelated hot sectors
Growth funded mostly by rising debt

debrief: Moat evidence is financial and durable: rising ROCE, compounding earnings that the price tracks, disciplined reinvestment, low debt. Stories are narratives that haven't (yet) become earnings — big-TAM decks, price without profit, debt-fuelled growth, and unrelated diversification. Wealth tracks earnings, not narratives.
